title: Bombing
description: Adds a way to create TNT wherever you want, even midair!
body:
# Bombing:

When you right-click, if you are holding TNT in your Main Hand, and a Flint and Steel in your Off Hand, and you aren’t looking at a block, 1 TNT will be removed from your Main Hand, the Flint and Steel in your Off Hand will take 1 point of damage, and a Primed TNT will be summoned at your location, which will act the same as if you just placed and ignited the TNT.

This is great for when you are flying over your friend’s base ready to drop a TNT airstrike ;)

# Other:

**Mod Packs:**

If you want to use this mod in a Mod Pack, you can, as long as you give me credit.
